task.name: customer transmits data to the customer service department
customer service receives the customer data
customer service enters customer data object into the CRM system
customer service compares entered data with the internal customer data
customer service corrects customer data
customer service checks customer data for completeness and plausibility
customer service creates new customer object
customer service prepares the contract documents for the power supplier switch
CIS checks the contract documents
customer service analyzes the causing issues
customer service resolves the causing issues
customer service generates contract documents
CIS sends out a confirmation document to the customer
CIS sends out grid operator request
grid operator checks request for supplier concurrence
grid operator transmits a response comment
grid operator informs all suppliers
grid operator demands the resolution of the conflict
grid operator communicates with the old supplier
grid operator terminates the sales agreement
customer service creates a CIS contract
customer checks the contract details
customer confirms the switch contract
customer withdraws from the switch contract
grid operator transmits the power meter data
grid operator computes the final billing
grid operator sends billing to the old supplier
old supplier creates final billing
customer services receive the meter data
customer service imports the meter data to systems
old supplier sends the billing to the customer
